The LTL formula uses the template G(bool_exp2 -> ((G[0,N_DURATION] bool_exp3) | (G bool_exp3))) which states that globally, if bool_exp2 is true, then it will be the case that bool_exp3 is true either within the next N_DURATION time steps, or for the entire remainder of the mission. In this case, bool_exp2 is 'infoRequest', indicating a user's information request and bool_exp3 is 'explainSuitable', which represents the robot's explanation of its suitability. This means that whenever the user requests information (infoRequest), the robot should always explain why it is suitable for the mission (explainSuitable), either immediately or within a bounded time (N_DURATION), or for the remainder of the mission.
